project_type: Python backtesting system for XAUUSD HFT scalping
build_system: pip (no formal build system, just pip install dependencies)
test_framework: No formal test framework, verification by running the backtest
build_command: pip3 install pandas numpy scipy scikit-learn
verification_instructions: Run the backtest script and verify output shows >500% return and <15% max drawdown
setup_instructions: pip3 install pandas numpy scipy scikit-learn
environment_constraints: Python 3.9.25 available, OPEN_INTERNET mode, can install any packages
contribution_requirements: No formal contribution guidelines - just make it work
key_patterns: Existing system uses: BaseStrategy abstract class with generate_signals() returning (n,3) array of [direction, sl_dist, tp_dist]; BacktestEngine iterates bars checking SL/TP hits; data_loader.py loads tick CSV and builds 1-min OHLC bars. The existing engine uses FIXED 0.1 lot sizing which limits returns.
directory_structure: hft_scalper/ - main package with backtest_engine.py, data_loader.py, optimizer.py, strategies/ subfolder; tick_data/ - raw tick CSV; .agents/tasks/ - task management
strategy_for_500pct: Complete rewrite of backtest engine to support: (1) Dynamic position sizing with compounding - scale lots based on current equity using Kelly Criterion, (2) Multiple concurrent strategies with portfolio allocation, (3) Adaptive regime detection to switch between trend-following and mean-reversion, (4) Aggressive risk-reward ratios with trailing stops, (5) Pyramiding into winning positions. The math: with $1000 start, need $5000+ profit. At 0.1 lot, need 5000+ points profit which is unrealistic in 29 days. With compounding: start 0.1 lot, grow to 0.5+ lots as equity grows - each trade contributes exponentially more.
